title: Build Gear
description: Adds gear that makes building easier - like by increasing your build range for example!
body:
You cannot live without Axiom's increased build range, but you don't own a Server License?

This datapack/mod adds a set of gear that, among other useful features, increases build range!
## Commands
Use **/function buildgear:give_items** to get all added items.
## Gear
Builder's Helmet
- Increases block and enitity interaction range

Runner's Boots
- Increases movement speed and step height
## Installing
As with any datapack, use **/reload** after placing **BuildGear.zip** in the datapacks folder of your server to activate it.
## Uninstalling
This Datapack does not need to be uninstalled before deletion.

## Feedback
Feel free to give me bug reports, feature ideas or other feedback on my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/u9SRbexPwk).
